code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut a = 0
  mut b = 0
  mut s = 0
  mut idx = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut has = false
  mut neg = false
  mut i = 0
  while i <= n
    let c = if i < n
      match string.byte_at(input, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        32
      end
    else
      32
    end
    if c >= 48 and c <= 57
      cur = cur * 10 + (c - 48)
      has = true
    else if c == 45 and not has
      neg = true
    else
      if has
        let val = if neg
          -cur
        else
          cur
        end
        if idx == 0
          a = val
        else if idx == 1
          b = val
        else if idx == 2
          s = val
        end
        idx = idx + 1
        cur = 0
        has = false
        neg = false
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut x = a
  mut first = true
  while x < b
    if first
      out = "#{x}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{x}"
    end
    x = x + s
  end
  println(out)
end
